display_name: Grok-4.1-Fast-Reasoning is a high-performance version of xAI’s Grok 4.1 Fast, the company’s best agentic tool‑calling model. It works great in real-world use cases like customer support, deep research
description: Grok-4.1-Fast-Reasoning is a high-performance version of xAI’s Grok 4.1 Fast, the company’s best agentic tool‑calling model. It works great in real-world use cases like customer support, deep research, and advanced analytical reasoning. Equipped with 2M‑token context window, this model processes vast information seamlessly, delivering coherent, context‑aware, and deeply reasoned insights at exceptional speed.
